projects.title: Student Grade Predictor
projects.description: Developed a machine learning system to predict student academic performance based on attendance, assignment scores, and prior semester grades. Used XGBoost classifier with 89% accuracy. Built a REST API using FastAPI and deployed to AWS EC2. Implemented feature importance analysis to identify key predictors.
projects.outcome: Deployed and presented at UTM Faculty Showcase 2024

projects.title: Twitter Sentiment Analysis API
projects.description: Built a sentiment analysis system for Malaysian Twitter data using fine-tuned BERT transformer model. Achieved 87% accuracy on a balanced 10,000-tweet test dataset. Developed a REST API using FastAPI for real-time inference. Applied preprocessing for Malay-English code-switching text.
projects.outcome: Published as GitHub open-source project with 47 stars

projects.title: Customer Churn Prediction Dashboard
projects.description: Internship project: Built a customer churn prediction model for a Malaysian telco dataset with 500,000+ records. Used scikit-learn pipeline with Random Forest and Gradient Boosting. Created an interactive dashboard in Tableau for the analytics team.
projects.outcome: Deployed in production at TechCorp Malaysia

projects.title: Library Management System
projects.description: Developed a full-stack web application for university library management. Backend implemented in Spring Boot with MySQL database. Features include role-based access control, book reservation, fine calculation, and report generation. Containerized with Docker.
projects.outcome: Adopted by MMU library department for pilot testing

projects.title: Task Manager REST API
projects.description: Designed and implemented a RESTful API for collaborative task management. Built with FastAPI and PostgreSQL. Implements JWT authentication, task assignment, deadline tracking, and email notifications. Comprehensive API documentation using Swagger/OpenAPI.

projects.title: Network Port Scanner Tool
projects.description: Built a multi-threaded network port scanner in Python capable of scanning large IP ranges. Features service fingerprinting, OS detection heuristics, and output in JSON/CSV/XML formats. Used in APU Cybersecurity Club training sessions.
projects.outcome: Open-sourced on GitHub, used by APU Cybersecurity Club
